description: Upgrade all of your citizen archers to Elite rank.
requirementsTooltip: Unlocked in Empire Phase. Requires “Advanced Foot Archery.”
tooltip:
[font="sans-bold-14"]Advanced Archer Infantry auto-promote to Elite Rank:
• Archer Infantry +20% projectile range and vision range.
• Archer Infantry +10% health and projectile accuracy.
• Archer Infantry +10% train time and +5 food and wood costs.[/font]
